query:
SELECT a.gs1_attribute_id, a.gs1_attribute_name, a.mapping_type, a.confidence, m.esrs_standard, m.short_name 
FROM gs1_attribute_esrs_mapping a 
JOIN gs1_esrs_mappings m ON a.esrs_mapping_id = m.mapping_id 
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT a.gs1_attribute_id, a.gs1_attribute_name, a.mapping_type, a.confidence, m.esrs_standard, m.short_name 
FROM gs1_attribute_esrs_mapping a 
JOIN gs1_esrs_mappings m ON a.esrs_mapping_id = m.mapping_id 
LIMIT 10
